productDisplayName: Salomon Men XR Mission Grey Sports Shoes
description: Style Note salomon XR Mission is a neutral shoe that even barefoot/natural runners will love (as it is not weighed down with its various aids). The grooves in the outsole give it enhanced flexibility and this shoe will please forefoot and heel strikers. The XR Mission intended to be a trail shoe but its aggressive tread allows for use on any terrain. Runners describe this shoe as smooth and responsive - as a high end running shoe should be. Suffice it to summarize that these multi-sport shoes provide comfort and support from the gym to the trails! Product Details Mesh and synthetic upper OrthoLite sockliner combines a specific Ortholite foam and an EVA heel cup. Ortholite foam creates a cooler, drier, healthier, better cushioned environment under the foot. It will not break down or lose effectiveness over time Quick-lacing system with pocket for laces Moulded EVA midsole Non-marking rubber Conta Grip outsole with all-terrain tread (Delivering optimal traction on varied surfaces, Salomon's Contagrip outsoles use the ideal combination of specialized rubbers for each specific use) TPU toe cap protects your toes from rocks and roots Material and Care Synthetic, fabric Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in sunlight
